text: Chinese patients usually have lots of mediastinal lymph nodes and thick tissue space.
Thus we use to carry out dissection and dissociation in combination with attractors and coagulation.
We use to carry out dissociation in spaces between lymph nodes and adipose tissue in the
To avoid bleeding and damage of tissue to the greatest extent is an important principle for making sure a clear view for the operation.
Only under this premise can make sure no accidentally injured a surrounding important organs.
After dividing upper right pulmonary artery and pulmonary vein, we will expose tissue in front of the carina by stretching the upper lobe tissue, thus, it can avoid damage of the bronchial stump.

During dissociation of bronchi of the upper lobe, sponge forceps within the auxiliary operation hole are used to stretch the whole upper lobe upwards, and attractors are used to help expose 10, 7 and 4 groups of tissues of bicipital side, lymph node head side and lymph node foot side respectively, and cut off connections of three tissues as much as possible.
After dividing tissues of these three groups of lymph nodes, we can dissociate the tenth group of lymph nodes away from distal bronchi.
At the same time, dissociate the bronchi for cutting sewing machine and dividing.

The seventh group of lymph nodes is located in the triangle space between left and right main bronchi, and pericardium, thus dissociate in a trilateral way when dissociate under the carina, namely the tip of the triangle, as the tissue in front of the carina has already been divided.
It is easy to be dragged out downward and avoid damage of the bronchial membrane.
The second and the fourth groups of lymph nodes are located in the groove between the main bronchus and the superior vena cava.
First, open the plurimediastinalis along the front of the vagus after raising the azegos vein.
Dissociation can be carried out from the foot to the head.
Here we mainly avoid damaging the back wall of precova.
